query:
You are a product analyst building a feature comparison matrix. The subject is the subject company (). Compare it against the 1 competitors below.

Competitors:
  1. name="Linear", website="linear.app"

STEP 1 — Identify 6 to 10 KEY FEATURES that matter when comparing these products. Group them by category (Core / Pricing / Integrations / Enterprise / Mobile). Return as 'features' array with {label, group}. The SAME features list must be used to score every competitor — choose features that are meaningful for all.

STEP 2 — For EACH competitor, return a 'capabilities' array with one entry per feature defined in step 1. Each entry: {feature: '<exact label>', value: '<one of full/part/none/soon>'}. 'full' = covered with a dedicated feature. 'part' = partial / limited coverage. 'none' = not supported. 'soon' = on public roadmap.

STEP 3 — For EACH competitor, also return notable_customers: 3-5 publicly known customers with {name, domain, segment (Grand compte/ETI/PME/Startup/Consumer), industry, evidence (case study URL or quote)}.

Omit any capability you cannot verify — do NOT guess. Return one competitor object per company in the SAME order as the input list. Preserve company names EXACTLY.
answer:
{"answer": "## Feature Comparison Matrix: Subject Company vs Linear

**Note:** The subject company field was empty in the input (no company name, domain, or identifier provided). Only the Linear competitor data is returned below.

---

### STEP 1 - Key Features

```json
{
  "features": [
    { "label": "Issue Tracking & Project Management", "group": "Core" },
    { "label": "Cycles/Sprints & Roadmapping", "group": "Core" },
    { "label": "AI-Powered Workflows", "group": "Core" },
    { "label": "Free Tier Available", "group": "Pricing" },
    { "label": "Developer Tool Integrations", "group": "Integrations" },
    { "label": "Communication & Support Integrations", "group": "Integrations" },
    { "label": "SSO/SAML & SCIM Provisioning", "group": "Enterprise" },
    { "label": "Compliance Certifications", "group": "Enterprise" },
    { "label": "Audit Logs & Advanced Access Control", "group": "Enterprise" },
    { "label": "Native iOS & Android App", "group": "Mobile" }
  ]
}
```

**Feature selection rationale:**

| Feature | Why it matters | Source |
|---|---|---|
| **Issue Tracking & Project Management** | Core value proposition of product development tools; covers issues, projects, and task management | [36] |
| **Cycles/Sprints & Roadmapping** | Agile delivery planning (cycles) and strategic roadmapping (initiatives, Linear Plan) are essential for modern product teams | [23] |
| **AI-Powered Workflows** | Differentiator in the AI era; covers Linear Agent, Code Intelligence, Triage Intelligence, Agent SDK | Linear Homepage |
| **Free Tier Available** | Adoption barrier and self-serve motion; Linear Free is $0 with unlimited members (250 issues cap) | [23] |
| **Developer Tool Integrations** | GitHub, GitLab, Sentry integration depth directly affects engineering workflow fit | [9] |
| **Communication & Support Integrations** | Slack, Zendesk, Intercom, Salesforce connectivity determines cross-functional alignment | [23] |
| **SSO/SAML & SCIM Provisioning** | Enterprise readiness gate; required for IdP federation and automated user provisioning | [12] |
| **Compliance Certifications** | SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, HIPAA/BAA are table-stakes for regulated industries | [27] |
| **Audit Logs & Advanced Access Control** | IP restrictions, domain claiming, third-party app management are critical for governance | [23], [12] |
| **Native iOS & Android App** | Mobile access for on-the-go triage and sprint monitoring | [16], [17] |

---

### STEP 2 - Competitor Capabilities

```json
{
  "competitors": [
    {
      "name": "Linear",
      "capabilities": [
        { "feature": "Issue Tracking & Project Management", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "Cycles/Sprints & Roadmapping", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "AI-Powered Workflows", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "Free Tier Available", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "Developer Tool Integrations", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "Communication & Support Integrations", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "SSO/SAML & SCIM Provisioning", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "Compliance Certifications", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "Audit Logs & Advanced Access Control", "value": "full" },
        { "feature": "Native iOS & Android App", "value": "full" }
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```

**Capability scoring evidence:**

| Feature | Score | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| Issue Tracking & Project Management | **full** | Core product - Issues, Projects, and task management are the primary features of Linear. Includes sub-teams, release pipelines, and file uploads. [23] lists these across all tiers. |
| Cycles/Sprints & Roadmapping | **full** | Dedicated Cycles feature for sprint planning, Initiatives for cross-project tracking, and "Linear Plan" for consolidated roadmapping with milestones, dependencies, and outcome prediction. Available on all tiers including Free. [29] |
| AI-Powered Workflows | **full** | Linear Agent (beta on Free/Basic, automations on Business), Code Intelligence (beta on Business), Triage Intelligence (Business), Agent SDK/Platform for building custom agents, and "Linear Asks" for multi-workspace intake management. [23], Agent Integrations |
| Free Tier Available | **full** | Free plan at $0 with unlimited members, 2 teams, 250 issues, Agent platform, mobile apps, API/webhooks. [23] |
| Developer Tool Integrations | **full** | 250+ integrations including GitHub, GitLab (with self-hosted support), Sentry, Figma, Cursor. GraphQL API and TypeScript SDK for custom integrations. MCP access available. [9], [45] |
| Communication & Support Integrations | **full** | Slack (native), Microsoft Teams, Zendesk (Business+), Intercom (Business+), Salesforce add-on (Business+), email integration via Linear Asks. Multi-tenant integration capability on Business tier. [23], [8] |
| SSO/SAML & SCIM Provisioning | **full** | SAML SSO on Enterprise plan supporting Okta, Entra, OneLogin, LastPass, Auth0, and more. SCIM provisioning on Enterprise. Google SSO available on all tiers. [12], [27] |
| Compliance Certifications | **full** | SOC 2 Type II compliant, ISO/IEC 27001:2022 certified, HIPAA compliant with BAA available, GDPR compliant. [27], [11] |
| Audit Logs & Advanced Access Control | **full** | Enterprise plan includes audit logs, IP restrictions, domain claiming, third-party app management, advanced authentication, and admin roles. Business adds SAML, guest accounts, private teams. [12], [23] |
| Native iOS & Android App | **full** | Native iOS and Android apps launched and available. Supports triage, issue creation/commenting, sprint status review. G2 score 4.8/5 from 800 reviews. [18], [16] |

---

### STEP 3 - Notable Customers

Engineer Atty Eleti: \"It really matters that the friction to create a ticket or the friction to modify a ticket, is really low.\""
```json
    },
    {

Head of Engineering Chintan Turakhia: \"I'm not designing things for humans anymore... I'm designing things for agents.\" Agents generated over 500 pull requests in 15 minutes during a Speedrun session."
    },
    {
      "name": "Ramp",
      "domain": "ramp.com",
      "segment": "Grand compte",
      "industry": "Fintech / Corporate Spend Management",
      "evidence": "https://linear.app/customers/ramp - Case study: \"The coding agent behind 60% of Ramp's merged PRs\". Adopted Linear at 5 employees; now 1,600 employees. Engineer Zach Bruggeman on the Agent API: \"a natural fit\" - agent integration prototyped to \"90 percent of the way there in about 30 minutes\"."
    },
    {
      "name": "Scale AI",
      "domain": "scale.com",
      "segment": "Grand compte",
      "industry": "AI Data Infrastructure",
      "evidence": "https://linear.app/customers/scale - Case study: \"How Scale compressed bug resolution time by 52%\". Head of Engineering Sam Sipe: \"Every month that we've used Linear, we've been able to find and report more bugs and fix them faster.\" Grassroots adoption from 50 planned seats to hundreds across Engineering, Product, Design, and Operations."
    },
    {
      "name": "Automattic",
      "domain": "automattic.com",
      "segment": "Grand compte",
      "industry": "SaaS / Web Publishing (WordPress)",
      "evidence": "https://linear.app/customers - Featured customer with case study on migration and unified product teams. Listed on Linear's customers page under the \"SaaS\" category."
    }
  ]
}
```

---

### Pricing Summary for Context

| Tier | Price | Key Limits | AI Features | Enterprise Features |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Free** | $0 | 250 issues, 2 teams, unlimited members | Linear Agent (beta), Agent platform | Google SSO |
| **Basic** | $10/user/mo (annual) | Unlimited issues, 5 teams, unlimited uploads | Linear Agent (beta) | Admin roles |
| **Business** | $16/user/mo (annual) | Unlimited teams, private teams, guests | Triage Intelligence, Code Intelligence (beta), Agent automations (beta), Linear Asks | SAML SSO, Zendesk/Intercom/Salesforce |
| **Enterprise** | Custom (annual) | All Business features + | All Business AI features | SCIM, audit logs, IP restrictions, domain claiming, HIPAA/BAA, dedicated account manager, uptime SLA |

Source: [23]

---

### Subject Company Note

The subject company field was empty in the input `()`. No company name, website, or identifier was provided. The features list above was designed to be universally applicable to product development / project management tools (the category Linear belongs to), so that the same feature set can be used to score any subject company once identified.
